reasoning: The control CP-9-b focuses on conducting backups of system-level information. In a Kubernetes context, this translates to ensuring that critical components like etcd, which stores cluster state, are backed up. Additionally, applications running on Kubernetes may require backup configurations, which can be indicated through annotations or labels on pods. Persistent volumes, which store application data, should also have backup policies defined to ensure data resilience.
title: System Backup - Conduct backups of system-level information...
